suite.name: Rules Crud

kw.name: Open Governance Dashboard
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\natik\\Documents\\Vibe\\sim-ai\\sim-ai\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\dbe7a003-31c3-4104-9481-e3888c240823"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:8081/index.html
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Wait For Load State
kw.msg: Waiting page load to state to receive networkidle in 30000.0
kw.doc: Waits that the page reaches the required load state.
Open the Sim.ai Governance Dashboard

test.name: Rules Tab Loads Successfully

kw.name: Navigate To Rules Tab
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=Governance Rules at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Click on Rules tab in navigation (or verify already there)

kw.name: Rules List Should Be Visible
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=Governance Rules at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.
Verify rules list is displayed

kw.name: Should Not Have Errors
Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.
Verify no error messages are displayed

test.doc: Smoke test: Rules tab loads without errors

test.name: Rules List Shows All Rules

kw.name: Navigate To Rules Tab
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector text=Governance Rules at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
Click on Rules tab in navigation (or verify already there)

kw.name: Get Rules Count
Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Elements
kw.doc: Returns a reference to Playwright [https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-locator|Locator] for all matched elements by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.
Get number of rules in the table/list

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Rules list displays expected number of rules

test.name: Rules List Has Rule ID Column

kw.name: Navigate To Rules Tab
Wait For Elements State

kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Rule Should Have ID Column
Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: TimeoutError: locator.waitFor: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('[data-testid="rule-col-id"]') to be visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
kw.status: TimeoutError: locator.waitFor: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('[data-testid="rule-col-id"]') to be visible

test.name: Rules List Rows Are Clickable

kw.name: Rule Row Should Be Clickable
Get Element
kw.msg:
Error: locator.waitFor: Error: strict mode violation: locator('[data-testid="rule-row"], .v-data-table tbody tr, .v-list-item') resolved to 16 elements: 1)
…
aka getByRole('option', { name: 'Rules' }) 2)
…

kw.name: Close All Browsers Safely
Run Keyword And Return Status
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Close all browsers with error handling

suite.doc:
Rules CRUD E2E Tests - Spec-First TDD (RED Phase) Per RULE-004: Page Object Model (POM) Per UI-FIRST-SPRINT-WORKFLOW.md: Spec-First TDD Per ENTITY-API-UI-MAP.md: Rule entity specification
These tests define the EXPECTED behavior of the Rules UI. Currently in RED phase - all tests SHOULD FAIL until UI implemented.
Gaps addressed: - GAP-UI-001: No data-testid attributes (all locators) - GAP-UI-002: No CRUD forms (CREATE/UPDATE tests) - GAP-UI-003: No detail drill-down (READ detail tests) - GAP-UI-006: Rules list missing rule_id column - GAP-UI-007: List rows not clickable - GAP-UI-010: No column sorting - GAP-UI-011: No filtering/faceted search
